args.query: Amazon shopping task ended at a product detail page with '[EXIT]' after searching for a ring light, likely without verifying required constraints like 16-inch size, adjustable brightness, phone holder, and under $40.

items.summary: The agent exited before reaching a page state that satisfies the task.
items.fix_hint: Require a final evidence check that the requested information or state is visible before sending an exit message.

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

items.summary: The agent returned a plausible result that missed qualifiers in the user's request.
items.fix_hint: Extract qualifiers such as recency, thresholds, or category before evaluating candidate results.

args.task: navigate: Find a 16-inch ring light on Amazon with adjustable brightness and a phone holder, under $40.

evidence.claim: The run reached a product detail page showing an Aureday 14" Selfie Ring Light with 62" Tripod Stand and Phone Holder.
The visible product title contradicts the hard size constraint: the task պահանջs a 16-inch ring light, but the page shows 14".
The visible page does support some other constraints: Dimmable LED / adjustable brightness, Phone Holder, and a Prime Member Price of $31.99 under $40.
The agent then sent '[EXIT]' immediately after this page without any evidence of checking alternative results for a true 16-inch item.

High-detail inspection of the search-submit step shows the query was submitted, but adjustable brightness, phone holder, and price were not yet visible at that stage; they only became visible on the product page later.

args.expected_behavior: Continue browsing or otherwise verify a product that satisfies all stated constraints, especially the required 16-inch size, before stopping or reporting success.
args.actual_behavior: Stopped on a 14-inch product detail page that met price, brightness, and phone-holder constraints but violated the 16-inch requirement, then exited.
args.regression_rule: Before ending a shopping task, verify every explicit hard constraint against the visible final candidate; do not accept a near-match when a size/specification requirement is contradicted.

suggested_followups.label: Inspect step 4 in detail
suggested_followups.message: Open the high-detail evidence for step 4 to see exactly why the 14-inch product was judged a near-match.

suggested_followups.label: Compare with a successful Amazon shopping run
suggested_followups.message: Show a validated successful run for the same task so I can compare how the 16-inch requirement was verified.
